caveat: ONE REPRESENTATIVE RAY (global sightline index 67 = first of the sorted seed=42 n_rays=1024 selection), NOT a typical spectrum and NOT hand-picked for agreement. Eval geometry n_rays=1024, eval_seed=42; the production MLP was TRAINED at n_rays=64. Single realization / fixed cosmology (Sherwood, one 60 cMpc/h box); z=0.3 scope-lock. Illustrative of the under-constrained z=0.3 flux inverse problem under this FGPA forward model; a single agreeing/ disagreeing ray is not a gate.
render_convention: published eval_partial_d13: tau_amp=1.0, no tau_max clamp
